title: Checkbox component with controlled and uncontrolled state management
purpose: Provides a reusable checkbox group component that supports both controlled and uncontrolled state, with options for disabling individual checkboxes and managing selection changes.
module_context: Exports a Checkbox React component with TypeScript interfaces for props and options, using React hooks for state management and accessibility attributes.

steps.content: Generate a unique ID for the component instance.
Create a group ID and description ID for accessibility.
Initialize internal state for checkbox values if not controlled externally.
Determine whether to use controlled or internal values based on props.
Define a change handler that updates values and notifies parent of changes.
Render a fieldset containing the checkbox group with appropriate labels and accessibility attributes.
Map over provided options to render individual checkboxes with their respective labels.
Determine the new set of values by either removing or adding the option value.
Update the internal state with the new values.
Notify the parent component of the change via the onChange callback.
